Soccer Tactics Board

Pick formations, drag players and the ball, sketch runs and passing lanes, capture frames to animate a move, then export a PNG or copy a shareable link. Everything runs in your browser.

Away
View
Frames no frames
Export
Drag players to move them. Double-click a token to relabel it.
Positions live in pitch coordinates, so PNG export and the share link stay accurate at any size · a max tool
